axis_responsibility: Brick: owns work kind through declared step_template_ref and Brick template catalog; notification only labels that declared fact.
Agent: owns performer identity and lane through Agent Object; notification only projects the resolved lane/role label.
Link: owns frontier, disposition owner, Movement, and route; notification only labels observed frontier/disposition facts and chooses no Movement.
Support: reporter/report_sinks/run/walker surfaces may render and deliver support projections only, after evidence is recorded.
This return supplies no next Movement recommendation and no success or quality judgment.
candidate_file_changes: support/checkers/check_package_path_admission.py: admit support/operator/label_map.json under the reporter notification projection target set.
support/operator/label_map.json: new canonical closed label data.
support/operator/reporter.py: projected current_work_kind/current_lane/current_agent_role and default/best-effort event policy helpers.
support/operator/report_sinks.py: customer-language Slack text, label lookup, injected Slack sender test seam.
support/operator/run.py: after-evidence best-effort event wiring for linear runs/holds.
support/operator/walker_kernel.py: after-evidence best-effort event wiring for dynamic runs/resumes/holds.
support/dashboard/src/data/labels.js: align displayed maps with canonical data, preserving existing exported helper names.
support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py: add label parity, message shape, auto-wiring, and no-scheduler probes into reporter_notification_projection.
support/checkers/profiles/read_side_projection_boundary.yaml: update path/text pins for the new label map and customer-language renderer expectations.
checker_or_verifier_plan: Label parity pin: load support/operator/label_map.json and compare dashboard labels.js exported label maps; missing or mismatched key/value goes RED.

Message shape pin: render the specimen packet; headline lines must include human building/status/stage/role/action fields and must not include work/step-outputs or full protocol refs; mutate renderer back to current Agent line shape and expect RED.

Auto-wiring pin: temp run with Slack env absent writes a local-inbox packet and does not invoke injected Slack sender; fake Slack env plus injected sender invokes exactly once per terminal/held event.
No-scheduler pin: AST/checker scan touched notification seams for threading, queue.Queue, Timer, sched, sleep, retry-loop constructs, and new report scheduler/queue modules.
Full gate after implementation: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all.
design_summary: Narrow design delta: add a canonical support-only Korean label map, project declared work kind and lane into report packets, render customer-language Slack text, and default-wire one synchronous best-effort notification call after recorded evidence exists.

Candidate after-text shape, not implemented/proven here: "브릭 알림
빌딩: <human building label>
상태: 완료|시작|멈춤·개입 필요
단계: 작업|설계|검수|마감
담당: 리더|워커|리뷰어
필요한 조치: 없음|호출자 또는 COO 처분 필요
운영자 ref: brick=<short ref>; step=<short ref>; frontier=<short ref>
한계: support 알림이며 source truth / 성공판정 / 품질판정 / Movement 권한이 아님".
Raw protocol refs should remain at most one short secondary operator line and never appear in the headline fields.
edge_cases: Missing building-map or declared-building-plan evidence: render building_id/status from available packet facts, leave work kind/lane blank or unknown, and add not_proven.
Graph plans and linear plans need both steps and brick_steps readers for step_template_ref and agent_object_ref matching.
Resume should not re-emit building_started; terminal or held event is enough unless a recorded start frontier exists.
Duplicate local-inbox report_id or sink exception must be caught at notification seam and surfaced as support observation.
Explicit report_event_policy sink refs should stay admitted-ref validated; absent policy uses default local-inbox plus env-gated sinks.
Dashboard labels.js currently has stale-looking movement/owner entries relative to active AGENTS language; parity work must separate active labels from historical display aliases.

invariants: Closed vocabulary only; unknown labels become visible fallback plus not_proven, not inferred labels.
Report packets remain source_truth false and keep proof_limits/not_proven.
Slack headline fields must not contain work/step-outputs paths, full frontier paths, credentials, channel ids, or token-shaped values.
Notification failure is recorded as support observation only and does not alter Building lifecycle evidence.
Checker/profile pass remains support evidence only.

No canonical support/operator label_map file or notification-specific checker file was found; the existing label source is support/dashboard/src/data/labels.js.

proposed_changes: Admit and add support/operator/label_map.json as the canonical closed data map with schema, locale ko, brick_kind, agent_lane, agent_role, building_event_kind, observed_board_state, disposition_owner, and active link_movement labels; structure it so an en locale can be added later without adding i18n machinery.

Keep active Link movement labels to forward/reroute only; if historical dashboard display needs stop/return/human, put those under clearly named legacy display maps and do not feed them into active Slack headline fields.

Extend reporter.py packet rendering to derive current_work_kind from declared step_template_ref and current_lane/current_agent_role from the declared agent_object_ref resolved through Agent resources; add evidence refs for the map/declared-plan basis and fall back to not_proven when missing.
Update report_sinks.py Slack composition to use the canonical map, render human headline fields, keep one operator-ref line, and reject raw step-output paths in headline lines.

Add a default event policy helper for the run seam: local-inbox always; slack only when BRICK_REPORT_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and BRICK_REPORT_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID are present; dashboard only when dashboard env is present; explicit enabled:false still disables.

Wire run.py and walker_kernel.py through a synchronous best-effort helper after evidence writes; catch notification exceptions into support observations so notification projection never blocks the Building evidence write.
Add an injected Slack sender seam for checker probes while keeping the default urllib path; do not add a provider SDK, queue, scheduler, retry loop, thread, or new sink.
relevant_current_structure: support/operator/report_sinks.py already owns admitted fan-out to local-inbox, operator-wake-local, slack, and dashboard sinks.
Slack real delivery already requires explicit allow_real_delivery and environment presence; missing Slack env returns a not-attempted observation.
Local inbox writes project/brick-protocol/status/inbox packets and validates source_truth false.

Building-map emission records Brick instances, Agent bindings, and Link edges, but step_template_ref and lane are available through declared-plan/declaration-provenance evidence rather than direct map row fields.
Agent lane can be resolved provider-neutrally from agent/objects via support/connection/agent_resources.py::resolve_agent_object.
Existing reporter_notification_projection kernel check already executes negative probes, local inbox write, operator wake write, event hook probes, forbidden-field rejects, and sink ceiling checks.
